error_signature: 520: Web server is returning an unknown error
title: OpenAI node returns 520 error due to rate limiting
symptom: The workflow fails to process requests with a 520 error from the OpenAI node when handling large batches. Smaller tests succeed, indicating a potential rate limit issue.
not_this_if: Error occurs with small batches or different nodes
root_cause: The 520 error indicates that the OpenAI API is unable to process the request due to rate limiting. This can happen when too many requests are sent in a short period, exceeding the allowed limits set by OpenAI.
fix_steps: Review OpenAI's rate limit documentation to understand the limits.
Stagger the processing of items to avoid hitting the rate limit.
agent_instruction: Check OpenAI's rate limits and adjust your workflow to stagger requests.
